calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-05-2006 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-05-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DAVID MENDEZ FOR PLAINTIFF JAYESH N PATEL
PARK DORM FOR DEFENDANT ROBERT BEHMER

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT TO REMAIN IN POSSESSION OF 2135 MISSION STREET, #43.
ON OR BEFORE 6AM 4/27/06, DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFF $1773.54. ON 4/28/06 DEFENDANT TO START PAYING WEEKLY RENT OF $82.50 TO 10/05/06.PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE RECEIPT OF PAYMENTS. PLAINTIFF TO FIX HOT WATER TO BEDROOM SINK. IF DEFENDANT COMPLIES WITH STIPULATION OR MOVES OUT BY 4/27/06, PLAINTIFF TO FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT COMPLY WITH AGREEMENT, PLAINTIFF TO FILE EXPARTE APPLICATION AND SEEK UNPAID RENTS AND COSTS TO DATE.
ALL PARTIES AGREE TO MUTUAL RELEASE. DEFENDANTS ATTORNEY SPECIFIES THAT THE AMOUNT OF $1773.54 COVERS ALL AMOUNTS OWED THROUGH 4/27/06 AND FILING FEES. ALL PARTIES VOIR DIRED AND
AGREE TO TERMS. STIPULATION SO ORDERED. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE PAPERWORK.

JUDGE PRO TEM: IRVING PFEFFER: CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS;REPORTER: RITA(ARLENE) HORWELL (218)
